global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with product illustrations and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a product available for a limited time at a special price.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Product illustration
elements.description: An illustration of a product with two windows and two circular buttons, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Additional product detail
elements.description: A smaller product detail illustration, positioned slightly to the left of the main product.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button with the text 'Try for free', located towards the bottom center.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small price tag displaying '€19.99', positioned below the main product illustration.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Your next favorite pick Only this weekend', centrally placed above the product.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Only this weekend €19.99 Try for free

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: The logo 'ZenDrop' displayed in a prominent position at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and playful, product illustration, promotional text
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the promotional text in the center, with the product illustration below, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ZenDrop, Your next favorite pick, Only this weekend, €19.99, Try for free
